new_classes.label_en: still wine of fresh grapes with PDO, actual alcoholic strength > 15% vol, other, in containers ≤ 2 L (CN 2204 21 78)
new_classes.label_de: Stillwein aus frischen Weintrauben mit g.U., tatsächlicher Alkoholgehalt > 15 % vol, andere, in Behältnissen ≤ 2 L (KN 2204 21 78)
new_classes.definition_en: Still wine of fresh grapes bearing a protected designation of origin (PDO), with an actual alcoholic strength by volume exceeding 15% vol, presented in containers of nominal volume not exceeding 2 litres, and not classified under CN 2204 21 74 (i.e. other PDO wines in this strength range). The total dry matter (Gesamttrockenstoff) is determined per Additional Note 4 to Chapter 22, comprising non-volatile substances including sugars, glycerol, tannins, tartaric acid, colourants and salts.

coverage_explanation: The axioms capture the core distinguishing criteria for CN 2204 21 78: still wine of fresh grapes (via parent class StillWineWithPDO2204Small → WineOfFreshGrapes), bearing a PDO quality (ProtectedDesignationOfOriginQuality restriction), actual alcoholic strength exceeding 15% vol (decimalRange minExclusive 15.0 on alcoholicStrengthByVolumePercent), and presented in containers of ≤ 2 L (SmallContainer via BFO has_part). A complement restriction relative to 2204 21 74 (the named sibling for specific PDO wines) discriminates this "other" residual class. However, the legal note references Additional Notes 4 and 5 to Chapter 22, which define total dry matter (Gesamttrockenstoff) via enumerated non-volatile substances (sugars, glycerol, tannins, tartaric acid, colourants, salts). No existing TBox property models dry-matter content or the specific non-volatile substance composition; introducing a full equivalence axiom capturing these chemical criteria would require additional properties and classes not yet in the TBox. This gap accounts for the reduced coverage score (~0.28 reduction). The sibling disjointness is only expressed against 22042174; a complete set of complement axioms against all siblings (22042111–22042196) is not modelled due to the large number of siblings and lack of a parent exhaustive partition axiom.
